div.p: The Department’s press release of October 4, 1950, announcing that the United Nations Command in Korea had accepted Colombia’s offer (made September 18) of a manned frigate, appears in the Department of State Bulletin, October 16, 1950, page 606.
On November 14 the Colombian Government offered an infantry battalion for Korean duty (ibid., November 27, 1950, page 870.) Pertinent documentation is scheduled for publication in volume I.
